description: Style presets for xuhua_story illustration generation

medium.description: Traditional and digital art media styles

styles.prompt_keywords: pencil sketch, graphite drawing, hand-drawn lines, shading, hatching, traditional art
colored pencil art, crayon-like texture, soft blending, traditional illustration
watercolor painting, soft washes, wet-on-wet technique, bleeding colors, delicate brushstrokes
gouache painting, opaque watercolor, matte finish, flat colors, vintage illustration style
oil painting, thick brushstrokes, impasto technique, rich colors, classical art
acrylic painting, vibrant colors, versatile texture, modern art technique
pastel art, soft chalky texture, blended colors, dreamy atmosphere
ink wash painting, sumi-e style, black and white gradients, brush strokes, zen aesthetic
charcoal drawing, dramatic shadows, smudged texture, high contrast, expressive strokes
digital painting, clean lines, smooth gradients, modern digital art
vector art, flat design, clean edges, geometric shapes, scalable graphics
pixel art, 8-bit style, retro gaming aesthetic, blocky pixels, limited palette
collage art, mixed media, cut paper, layered textures, assemblage
linocut print, woodblock style, bold lines, high contrast, printmaking
impressionist style, Monet-inspired, soft brushwork, light and color study, plein air
post-impressionist, Van Gogh inspired, bold colors, expressive brushstrokes, emotional
expressionist style, distorted forms, emotional intensity, bold colors, dramatic
surrealist art, dreamlike, impossible scenes, Dali-inspired, subconscious imagery
art nouveau style, Mucha-inspired, flowing lines, organic forms, decorative borders
art deco style, geometric patterns, luxurious, gold accents, 1920s glamour

romantic art style, dramatic landscapes, emotional, sublime nature, dramatic lighting
baroque style, dramatic chiaroscuro, rich details, ornate, theatrical lighting
